narrative:
Precinct Hopewell C (precinct in Seneca County) has 478 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.8 percentage points.
